title: Smokeless Fire (No Smoke)
body:
This texture pack removes the smoke from a camfire, fire and the smoke when lava burns an object. It is useful for increasing visibility during PvP and I think it makes things look cleaner (personal preference).

I recommend you pair this pack with [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-(very-low)) to increase visibility further.


Replaces these particle textures with a transparent image:

- big_smoke_0
- big_smoke_1
- big_smoke_2
- big_smoke_3
- big_smoke_4
- big_smoke_5
- big_smoke_6
- big_smoke_7
- big_smoke_8
- big_smoke_9
- big_smoke_10
- big_smoke_11
- flame
- lava
- generic_0
- generic_1
- generic_2
- generic_3
- generic_4
- generic_5
- generic_6
- generic_7
